summary: Internal Dashboard project with role-based rendering at /dashboard/internal. Admin/Superadmin see all roles in toggleable accordions; other roles only see their own dashboard. Each role section has Summary Cards, Middle Section (Details/List), and Bottom Section (History/Tickets), all toggleable.
architectural_notes: Route /dashboard/internal renders role-based dashboards; Admin/Superadmin see all roles via accordion (toggleRoleAccordion), others see only their own role
Each role section has three parts: Summary Cards (grid), Middle Section (Details/List), Bottom Section (History/Tickets) — each toggleable via toggleSection

existing_features.title: Update `frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.tsx` to implement role-based rendering: if the current role is 'Admin' or 'Superadmin' (isSuperAdmin), render dashboards for ALL roles in a toggleable accordion (one accordion per role, toggled via `toggleRoleAccordion`); otherwise, only render the dashboard section for the currently logged-in role.

Within each role section in `frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.tsx`, render three sub-sections: (1) a grid of Summary Cards via `renderSummaryCards(r)`, (2) a Middle Section ('Details / List Section') toggled by clicking via `toggleSection(r, 'middle')` and conditionally rendering `renderMiddleSection(r)`, and (3) a Bottom Section ('History / Tickets Section') toggled by clicking via `toggleSection(r, 'bottom')` and conditionally rendering `renderBottomSection(r)`.

Ensure the `frontend/src/App.tsx` route for `/dashboard/internal` passes a valid role prop (e.g., 'Admin' or 'Superadmin') to `InternalDashboard` so that the admin accordion view can be tested end-to-end.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add role-based rendering to /dashboard/internal: Admin/Superadmin see all roles in toggleable accordions; other roles only see their own dashboard with Summary Cards, Middle Section, and Bottom Section
